summary: High‑energy Europe ’81 show with a fiery second set and crisp soundboard recording despite occasional cuts.
review: The performance shines especially in the second half, delivering scorching Spanish Jam, a standout Satisfaction encore, and punchy Black Peter while the mix keeps drums and Brent’s keyboards front‑and‑center. The soundboard source is generally clear and well balanced, though a few listeners note brief drop‑outs toward the end.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently strong musical praise (standout songs, high energy) combined with generally good soundboard quality; only minor recording glitches keep it from a perfect score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear and well‑balanced board mix – drums praised as perfect in the mix, Brent’s keyboards highlighted. A few reviewers mention occasional cuts/funky drop‑outs near the ending.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set ramps up intensity with seamless transitions (e.g., Spanish Jam into Wheel, Wheel into Sugar Magnolia) and a high‑energy Satisfaction encore; overall pacing is varied and engaging.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Over‑the‑top on Black Peter and pushes the tempo up a notch on Sugar Magnolia.
band_member_comments.Bob: Strong vocal performance, especially paired with Brent on Satisfaction.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard tone is praised as great; his work on Lost Sailor noted as evocative.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums are described as perfect in the mix and drive the high‑energy feel.
